# Project AI Instructions

## Agent Workflow
1. @BacklogManager - Feature brainstorming and backlog management
2. @Conductor - Pipeline orchestration
3. Automated pipeline through remaining agents
4. @DevOps triggered only if deployment scope is Staging/Production

## Default Deployment Scope
**Local** - Test everything locally first

## Code Standards
- TypeScript strict mode
- 80%+ test coverage
- JSDoc comments on all public functions
- Use ESLint with Airbnb style guide
- Use Prettier for code formatting
